constraints.name: operation_limit
constraints.description: The program is allowed to query the distance between any two vertices at most 5N times. Exceeding this query limit results in a wrong answer.

constraints.name: path_constraint
constraints.description: The output must be a vertex sequence representing a shortest path from s to t, where the first vertex is s, the last is t, and every consecutive pair of vertices in the sequence must be directly connected by an edge in the graph.
constraints.formal: x_1 = s, x_k = t, ∀i ∈ [1, k-1], (x_i, x_{i+1}) ∈ E, and path length is minimal

constraints.name: connectivity
constraints.description: The underlying graph is guaranteed to be connected, ensuring that a valid path exists between any pair of vertices.

objective.description: 构造并输出从指定起点到终点的最短路径顶点序列

invariants.name: shortest_path_metric
invariants.description: 在任意连通图中,顶点 i 位于 s 到 t 的某条最短路径上的充要条件是 dist(s, i) + dist(i, t) == dist(s, t)。该度量等式在距离查询过程中恒定成立,用于精确筛选出所有可能构成最短路径的候选顶点集合。

properties.equality_condition: dist(s, i) + dist(i, t) == dist(s, t)
properties.vertex_classification: satisfying vertices constitute the union of all shortest paths between s and t

invariants.name: monotonicity
invariants.description: 最短路径上顶点的源点距离 dist(s, ·) 沿路径推进方向严格单调递增。将满足度量等式的候选顶点按该距离升序排列后,序列中相邻顶点间的距离差恰好等于直接相连的边权,从而保证排序后的顶点序列天然构成一条合法的最短路径。

properties.sequence_adjacency: consecutive vertices in distance-sorted order are directly connected by an edge
